anatomy.description: Fully circular frame sized to the chosen size token. Clips photo or placeholder to a circle. border-radius: 50%.
User profile photo, clipped to fill the circular container (object-cover). Shown when a valid image source is provided.
anatomy.condition: Shown when src is provided and valid.

anatomy.description: Silhouette icon on a neutral background. Shown when no photo is available. Corresponds to 'pic1' in Figma sample data.
anatomy.condition: Shown as fallback when no src is provided, or on image load error.

variantNote: No structural variants. The Figma 'avatar' prop (pic1–pic5) is sample content for documentation preview only, not product variants. pic1 is the placeholder/no-photo state.
sizeNote: All sizes are square and fully circular (border-radius: 50%).
stateNote: No interactive states defined in Figma. Avatar is a display-only component. Visual content is either 'with photo' or 'placeholder (no photo)'.

shape.note: Always fully circular. Never square or rounded-square.

usageContext: Represents a user, driver, or customer in product UI.
Confirmed in Dojo Customer App (node 84:93) and Dojo Driver App (node 2007:325).
Used in profile screens, trip summaries, driver cards, ratings, and chat headers.
notes: No type variants — single visual style.
7 sizes confirmed: XS (24px), SM (32px), MD (40px), LG (48px), XL (56px), XXL (72px), Largest (96px).
The Figma 'avatar' prop (pic1–pic5) is sample data for documentation — not a product variant dimension.
pic1 in Figma = placeholder silhouette (no-photo state).
No interactive states defined. Display-only component.
